name: @nimblebraininc/todoist
description: MCP server for the Todoist API

tools.name: get_tasks
tools.description: List tasks, optionally filtered by project or Todoist filter string

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task with optional due date, project, and priority

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as completed by ID

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Edit a task's content, description, due date, or priority
